sections.heading: Meet the Salesforce Certified Revenue Cloud Consultant certification
sections.text: Have you met theSalesforce Certified Revenue Cloud Consultant certification? This exam proves your next-level ability to scope, design, build, and deploy Revenue Cloud – a composable and Agentforce-ready platform that allows revenue to flow seamlessly across every channel, from sales reps and partner portals to self-service and field service. The exam is for individuals with a broad knowledge of the Product-to-Cash lifecycle and hands-on experience using the Revenue Cloud platform on core. Candidates for the Salesforce Certified Revenue Cloud Consultant exam generally have two to three years of Product-to-Cash domain experience.Details about the exam: 60 multiple-choice questions and up to five unscored questionsTime allotted to complete the exam: 105 minutesPassing score: 62%Registration fee: USD 200, plus applicable taxes as required per local law; JPY 30,000Retake fee: USD 100, plus applicable taxes as required per local law; JPY 30,000Delivery options: Proctored exam delivered onsite at a testing center or in an online environment Interested in getting certified? Read more to learn why the Salesforce Certified Revenue Cloud Consultant is next level.

sections.heading: Showcase your next-level expertise on a fully unified revenue platform
sections.text: Earning the Salesforce Certified Revenue Cloud Consultant certification shows your expertise on a fully unified revenue platform.Revenue Cloudconnects the entire revenue lifecycle, unifying sales, partners, finance, and operations to drive revenue from anywhere. That’s a tremendous step forward for the world of revenue management. Salesforce CPQ, our original product in this space, is a key part of what we now recognize as the second wave of CPQ. Revenue Cloud, however, is not just a quoting tool. It delivers the third wave of CPQ by offering a fully unified revenue platform that includes CPQ, contracts, orders, invoicing, and more, all built natively on Salesforce and designed to manage the entire revenue lifecycle. The Salesforce Certified Revenue Cloud Consultant certification proves your ability to consult on revenue management for a new era. It shows that you know how to equip sales representatives with the right product and pricing tools to close deals quickly, while providing sales and finance leaders with insights to determine the most impactful revenue strategies.

sections.heading: Validate your next-level knowledge of an agent-ready, API-first platform
sections.text: When you earn the Salesforce Certified Revenue Cloud Consultant certification, it confirms you have the background to deploy an agent-ready, API-first solution for all types of businesses. It proves your ability to design and implement solutions that can support agents embedded across Revenue Cloud. The certification also validates your ability to customize, manage, and collaborate with developers on Revenue Cloud’s API-first design. This is key knowledge, as Revenue Cloud features modular, plug-and-play APIs across every revenue-critical business process. And when agents need to take action, the business APIs enable those actions, giving them the power to operate quickly, efficiently, and autonomously. But what’s most next level about being a Salesforce Certified Revenue Cloud Consultant is your adaptability to the variety of ways businesses use Revenue Cloud. Whether they prefer clicks, code, or both, you know how to flex with how a business uniquely manages their revenue operations.

sections.heading: Prepare for the certification exam
sections.text: Before your official exam day, be sure to arrive prepared. TheSalesforce Certified Revenue Cloud Consultant exam guideis the place to start. That guide shares our recommended exam preparation trail,Prepare for Your Salesforce Revenue Cloud Consultant Exam. It is a comprehensive and fun learning experience that guides you through the subject matter you will need to prepare for. On top of preparing for the exam itself, it’s important to be familiar with what to expect on exam day. Please visit theSalesforce Certification Exam Pre-Check Processfor a step-by-step guide to the exam pre-check process for online-proctored Salesforce certification exams and Salesforce certification exams at testing centers. Take the leap and schedule your Salesforce Certified Revenue Cloud Consultant certification today! Table of contents

  • Meet the Salesforce Certified Revenue Cloud Consultant certification 
  • Showcase your next-level expertise on a fully unified revenue platform
  • Validate your next-level knowledge of an agent-ready, API-first platform
  • Prepare for the certification exam

Meet the Salesforce Certified Revenue Cloud Consultant certification 

Have you met the Salesforce Certified Revenue Cloud Consultant certification?

This exam proves your next-level ability to scope, design, build, and deploy Revenue Cloud – a composable and Agentforce-ready platform that allows revenue to flow seamlessly across every channel, from sales reps and partner portals to self-service and field service. 

The exam is for individuals with a broad knowledge of the Product-to-Cash lifecycle and hands-on experience using the Revenue Cloud platform on core. Candidates for the Salesforce Certified Revenue Cloud Consultant exam generally have two to three years of Product-to-Cash domain experience.

Details about the exam: 

  • 60 multiple-choice questions and up to five unscored questions
  • Time allotted to complete the exam: 105 minutes
  • Passing score: 62%
  • Registration fee: USD 200, plus applicable taxes as required per local law; JPY 30,000
  • Retake fee: USD 100, plus applicable taxes as required per local law; JPY 30,000 
  • Delivery options: Proctored exam delivered onsite at a testing center or in an online environment

Interested in getting certified? Read more to learn why the Salesforce Certified Revenue Cloud Consultant is next level.

Showcase your next-level expertise on a fully unified revenue platform

Earning the Salesforce Certified Revenue Cloud Consultant certification shows your expertise on a fully unified revenue platform. Revenue Cloud connects the entire revenue lifecycle, unifying sales, partners, finance, and operations to drive revenue from anywhere. That’s a tremendous step forward for the world of revenue management.

Salesforce CPQ, our original product in this space, is a key part of what we now recognize as the second wave of CPQ. Revenue Cloud, however, is not just a quoting tool. It delivers the third wave of CPQ by offering a fully unified revenue platform that includes CPQ, contracts, orders, invoicing, and more, all built natively on Salesforce and designed to manage the entire revenue lifecycle.

The Salesforce Certified Revenue Cloud Consultant certification proves your ability to consult on revenue management for a new era. It shows that you know how to equip sales representatives with the right product and pricing tools to close deals quickly, while providing sales and finance leaders with insights to determine the most impactful revenue strategies. 


Validate your next-level knowledge of an agent-ready, API-first platform

When you earn the Salesforce Certified Revenue Cloud Consultant certification, it confirms you have the background to deploy an agent-ready, API-first solution for all types of businesses. It proves your ability to design and implement solutions that can support agents embedded across Revenue Cloud. 

The certification also validates your ability to customize, manage, and collaborate with developers on Revenue Cloud’s API-first design. This is key knowledge, as Revenue Cloud features modular, plug-and-play APIs across every revenue-critical business process. And when agents need to take action, the business APIs enable those actions, giving them the power to operate quickly, efficiently, and autonomously.  

But what’s most next level about being a Salesforce Certified Revenue Cloud Consultant is your adaptability to the variety of ways businesses use Revenue Cloud. Whether they prefer clicks, code, or both, you know how to flex with how a business uniquely manages their revenue operations.

Prepare for the certification exam

Before your official exam day, be sure to arrive prepared. The Salesforce Certified Revenue Cloud Consultant exam guide is the place to start. That guide shares our recommended exam preparation trail, Prepare for Your Salesforce Revenue Cloud Consultant Exam. It is a comprehensive and fun learning experience that guides you through the subject matter you will need to prepare for.

On top of preparing for the exam itself, it’s important to be familiar with what to expect on exam day. Please visit the Salesforce Certification Exam Pre-Check Process for a step-by-step guide to the exam pre-check process for online-proctored Salesforce certification exams and Salesforce certification exams at testing centers.

Take the leap and schedule your Salesforce Certified Revenue Cloud Consultant certification today! 

Schedule your exam
